about: With over 15 years of academic experience, I specialize in simplifying complex scientific concepts. My goal is to transform "I can't do math" into "I love problem-solving." I've helped 500+ students achieve top grades in Cambridge/Edexcel ALs.

feedback.name: Kasun T.
feedback.text: Dr. Aruni is incredible. She explains quantum physics like it's a bedtime story. Highly recommended for AL students.

feedback.name: Sarah M.
feedback.text: The whiteboard sessions are very helpful. I finally understand integration after two years of struggling.
